title: Sevaiiya Stir Fry Crunchy Delight
description: A unique and crunchy Sevaiiya stir fry dish that combines the best of Italian flavors with crunchy textures.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the Sevaiiya and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until it starts to brown.
Add the Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper, and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the crunchy Italian breadcrumbs and stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the Sevaiiya stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
If using red pepper flakes, sprinkle them on top for added heat.
